context: UC-6 complete. UC-7 and UC-8 queued but never spawned.

milestones.name: SmsComposer with AI Assist
criteria: Agent can edit suggestion before send

milestones.name: Integration & E2E Testing
criteria: All components wired into lead detail page
E2E test: type → send → appears in thread

milestones.name: Schema & Data Model
criteria: Fields: lead_id, sequence_type, step, last_sent_at, next_send_at, status

milestones.name: Cron Handler - follow-up logic
criteria: Identifies leads needing follow-up (24h no response, 4h post-booking, 30m no-show, 7d nurture)
Calls AI to generate contextual message, sends via send-manual endpoint

milestones.name: State Controls & Max Messages
criteria: If lead responds: set sequence status = 'paused'
Cron respects state: only sends if status='active' AND step<3

milestones.name: Testing & Deployment
criteria: Integration test: create lead → trigger cron → verify SMS + state update
Zero TypeScript errors, Vercel deploy successful

phase_2_sequential_3h.gate: UC7-M3 integrated, UC8-M2 cron logic done

phase_3_final_3h.gate: All E2E tests pass, zero errors, ready to merge

resource_gaps: AI Suggest endpoint (/api/sms/ai-suggest) - create for UC7-M3
Vercel Pro plan required (cron feature) - confirm available
Test Twilio number - use existing or create new

spawn_instructions.task: Execute UC-7 and UC-8 from this decomposition (26 hours total, 3 phases with checkpoints)
spawn_instructions.success_definition: Both UCs production-ready (zero errors, all E2E tests pass, deployed to Vercel staging)
